text:
Fritz is the name of an ancient Eldian Tribal Leader, later crowned as King, who sired three daughters with his slave, Ymir Fritz. Other articles with this name include:

King Fritz - A false King, a figurehead, with no relation to the Reiss family, who was actually used by Rod Reiss in order to hide his true identity.
Karl Fritz - The 145th King of the Fritz lineage, who put an end to the Great Titan War and retreated behind the Walls.

See also:

Fritz family - The Fritz royal family.
